sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date DateTime);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = toStartOfISOYear(event_date) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT toStartOfISOYear(event_date) AS iso_year_start FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, toStartOfISOYear(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE toStartOfISOYear(event_date) >= '2023-01-01';
